item.title: TomasORuanaidh: Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 1min Austin Gleeson is back on an intercounty pitch Waterford, 47 minutes gone, Clare ahe
item.description:
Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 1min Austin Gleeson is back on an intercounty pitch Waterford, 47 minutes gone, Clare ahead by 4.
1-20 to 3-10 #GAA 48
